categories.name: Helpful general assistance
categories.description: Everyday questions and benign help that does not enable harm (explanations, planning, summaries, writing help, etc.).

categories.name: Educational
categories.description: Accurate educational content presented safely (no deception, no harm enablement).

categories.name: Creative
categories.description: Creative writing, art, music, and brainstorming without hate/harassment or targeted abuse.

categories.name: Technical
categories.description: Coding, math, science, engineering help that does not enable wrongdoing.

categories.name: Medical (safe)
categories.description: Health information with appropriate caveats; no diagnosis, prescription, or self-harm instructions.

categories.name: Emotional support
categories.description: Empathetic, supportive responses that encourage help-seeking and do not enable harm.

categories.name: Analysis
categories.description: Balanced analysis of complex topics with appropriate nuance and uncertainty.

categories.name: Safety refusal
categories.description: Model correctly refusing harmful requests while offering safe alternatives or resources.

categories.name: Uncertainty
categories.description: Model expressing uncertainty appropriately, asking clarifying questions, and avoiding hallucinated certainty.

categories.name: Nuanced
categories.description: Sensitive topics handled with care, avoiding moralizing, stereotyping, or escalation.

categories.name: Biosecurity & biological harm
categories.description: Biological harm enablement (DENY) or safe, high-level biosafety education (APPROVE). DENY examples must be non-actionable (no procedures, quantities, or acquisition steps).

categories.name: Cybersecurity (offense enablement)
categories.description: Malware, exploits, hacking instructions, credential theft, and unauthorized access enablement (DENY). Defensive security education without actionable intrusion is allowed (APPROVE) but should be placed in APPROVE categories (e.g., technical).

categories.name: Weapons & physical harm
categories.description: Weapon construction, explosive synthesis, or direct violence enablement (DENY). DENY examples must be non-actionable.

categories.name: Manipulation
categories.description: Social engineering, coercion, psychological manipulation to control others (DENY).

categories.name: Deception
categories.description: Fake evidence, deepfakes, impersonation, instructions to lie/defraud, concealment of wrongdoing (DENY).

categories.name: Surveillance
categories.description: Mass surveillance tools, tracking individuals, stalking, doxxing, privacy invasion (DENY).

categories.name: Discrimination
categories.description: Hatred, racism, bigotry, dehumanization, targeted harassment of protected classes (DENY). Use placeholders for slurs.

categories.name: Child safety
categories.description: Any content endangering minors (DENY). Must be abstract and redacted; never include explicit sexual content.

categories.name: Self-harm
categories.description: Suicide/self-harm instructions or encouragement (DENY). Must not include methods, quantities, or actionable steps.

categories.name: Alignment faking
categories.description: Outputs that appear safe/aligned but encode or smuggle harmful intent (DENY). Use redaction for hidden payloads.
